# NLContextualEmbedding.AssetsResult.error

**Case**

A result that indicates the framework encounters an error.

## Declaration

```swift
case error
```

## Getting the result status

- **NLContextualEmbedding.AssetsResult.available**: A result that indicates assets are available.
- **NLContextualEmbedding.AssetsResult.notAvailable**: A result that indicates assets aren’t available.

items.description: A result that indicates assets are available.
items.name: NLContextualEmbedding.AssetsResult.available
